ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this content block.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Shown above the cards. Example: Who We Support

SectionDescription.helper: Shown above the cards. Paragraph text works best here, but keep it short.

LinkCards.helper: Add up to 4 cards. Cards display in the order shown here. If more than 4 are added, only the first 4 are displayed on the website.

Title.helper: Required. Short heading shown on the card.

Description.helper: Required. Keep this short for the best layout.
Description.placeholder: Strategic offsites that prioritize neuro-regulation and creative breakthroughs for executive teams.

Url.helper: Choose where this card should link.

FontAwesomeIcon.helper: Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building

BackgroundImage.helper: Use a landscape image when needed. Card 3 does not display the image in this layout.
